creator: tonymaher@optusnet.com.au
text:
Hello,

I see this PR is closed but I still get the same error.
I have just run csup just to make sure I am up to date.
I am on amd64 machine if that makes a difference.
Also I do not understand why the replacement string differs from
what was originally listed at  top of PR to what was committed.
's/\x83\x3f\x5f\x75\x02/\x83\x3f\x16\x75\x02/'
's/\x83\xf8\x5f\x0f\x84/\x83\xf8\x16\x0f\x84/'

Not that it made any difference both appeared to fail for me.
